narrative:
Perry Twp. township has 680 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.3 percentage points.
